name: Hinge Health, Inc.
business: Hinge Health sells a digital musculoskeletal (MSK) care platform that leverages AI-powered motion tracking and a proprietary electrical nerve stimulation wearable device to deliver automated care. Its clients are primarily self-insured employers, and it also serves health plans (fully-insured and Medicare Advantage), federal insurance plans, and multinational corporations.
sellsTo: Public sector employers (state/local governments, labor unions)
namedCustomers: Employer Direct Healthcare, LLC d/b/a Lantern Specialty Care

exposures.sentence: Hinge Health leverages software, including AI, to automate care for joint and muscle health, delivering an outstanding member experience, improved member outcomes, and cost reductions for our clients and members.
Hinge Health leverages software, including AI, to automate care for joint and muscle health.

Enso, our proprietary device for electrical nerve stimulation, was supported by 8 issued patents as well as 12 pending patent applications in the U.S. and the European Patent Office, as of December 31, 2025.

Our patented AI-powered motion tracking technology gives members access to leading exercise form guidance and correction using the measurement of human motion in 3D, which are available through the camera on their mobile device or personal tablet.

Enso, our proprietary device for electrical nerve stimulation, was supported by 8 issued patents as well as 12 pending patent applications in the U.S. and the European Patent Office, as of December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Global program expansion into additional countries in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have now expanded into Canada, France, Germany, Ireland, the Netherlands, and the United Kingdom ('UK') and expect to further expand our global footprint in 2026.
